message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Context headings fix confirmed, requesting re-review">
Steve, your blocking item (context headings in All view) was already addressed in the prior commit c50b5d7, and I've now pushed additional fixes in e2c292e (CI green). 

The All view now shows actions grouped under context headings (`<h2>` elements inside `<section>` elements with `aria-labelledby`). The filtered view shows a flat list without headings (since the filter pill already indicates the context).

I also addressed your Minor #2 (context select defaults to filtered context) in the prior commit.

Please re-review when you can and let me know if you're satisfied with the changes.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already verified these fixes and sent my approval. Let me confirm to Luca directly.

input.content:
Luca, I already re-reviewed and verified both fixes earlier -- the context headings in the "All" view (with `<h2>`, `<section>`, `aria-labelledby`) and the context select defaulting to the filtered context. Both look correct.

My **CONSENSUS: APPROVED** stands. No further changes needed from my end.
